cards.sentence_en: Dear staff, This is to inform you that our customer support team will be relocated next month. Starting from May 3, the team will move from the 5th floor to the 9th floor of the same building. The new office will have a larger meeting room and upgraded computer equipment. Please make sure to pack all personal belongings by April 28. IT staff will assist you with moving your desktop computers on April 30. If you need temporary storage boxes, please contact Ms. Rivera in the HR department. We appreciate your cooperation during this transition period.
